Airport PHUKET to Outrigger Phi Phi Island Resort PHI PHI ISLAND by joined resort land & boat
remark:
The price includes the resort private land transfer from Phuket Airport to Royal Phuket Marina Pier (1.5hr) and the boat transfer to the resort (1.5hr).
A minimum of 2 paid persons is required to apply the SIC rate.

Resort Boat Schedule
Royal Phuket Marina to Resort : 14:00-15:30 hrs
Resort to Royal Phuket Marina: 11:00-12:30 hrs

Clients arriving at Phuket Airport after 11:30h required an overnight stopover in Phuket or arrange a  private speedboat transfer at supplement charge (subject to confirmation on case-by-case)
Clients departing from Phuket Airport with Domestic flight before 16:00h or with International flight before 17:00h required an overnight stopover in Phuket or arrange a  private speedboat transfer at supplement charge (subject to confirmation on case-by-case)

Please note the transfer is NOT recommend for pregnant women, passengers under 1 year old and over 70 years old due to safety reasons.
Public ferry transfer service is more recommended

description: Airport PHUKET to Island Escape by Burasari Resort COCONUT ISLAND by joined resort land & boat
remark:
The price includes the resort private land transfer from Phuket Airport to Boat Lagoon Pier (45 min) and shared resort boat transfer (available on check-in and check-out dates only)
A minimum of 2 paid persons is required to apply the SIC rate.

Resort Boat Schedule
Boat Lagoon Pier to Resort: 09:30h-10:00h / 10:30h-11:00h / 12:00h-1230h / 14:00h-14:30h / 15:30h-15:30h/  17:00h-17:30h
Resort to Boat Lagoon Pier: 10:00h-10:30h / 11:30h-12:00h / 12:30h-13:00h / 15:00h-15:30h / 16:00h-16:30h / 17:30h-18:00h

Clients arriving at Phuket Airport later than 14:30hrs require an overnight stopover in Phuket or arrange a private boat transfer to the resort additionally at supplement charge
Clients departing from Phuket Airport with Domestic flight before 15:00h or with International flight before 16:00h required an overnight stopover in Phuket or arrange a private boat transfer to the resort additionally at supplement charge.
